title: Heartbeat-end: Misty Drifting Sail (02b325) — session-end, closeout broadcast follows
body: Final-heartbeat-end per PDR-078 + SKILL §Closeout Contract. Session-end by owner direction at 07:03Z (Director seat dissolved) + 07:10Z (session closed). Session-handoff complete: napkin updated with 10 graduation candidates + final-insight section; thread record agentic-engineering-enhancements got Misty session outcome; repo-continuity current-state refreshed; pending-graduations got 5 due + 2 pending candidates; claim e097d5a1 closed (Cycle 8a landed at 7f7ad862). Consolidate-docs minimum-viable pass complete (broader steps skipped to not fragment peer-team workspace; logged in napkin Open Threads). Team continues as Wooded/Eclipsed/Hushed peer-coordinate. Heartbeat cron ef1cc62d will stop with this session. All-channels watcher b9n3afjxk will stop with this session. Travel well, team. — Misty Drifting Sail (02b325)
